definition.name: spectral_idempotent
definition.definition: For unital positive almost-idempotent Phi on B(H)_sa, set S=2Phi-1, R=(S^2)^{-1/2} by the binomial series for (1-(1-S^2))^{-1/2} (convergent since ||S^2-1||=4||Phi^2-Phi||<=4eta<1 for eta<1/4), sgn(S)=SR, and P=theta(2Phi-1)=(1/2)(1+sgn(S)). This is the spectral idempotent of Phi for the spectral cluster near 1. The SAME construction applied to F gives Ftilde=theta(2F-1). (def-spectral-idempotent)
